footer_rights: © 2026 Niazi Khpalwak Car Showroom — All Rights Reserved
provide: We provide reliable car buying and selling services including container cars, Lisensed cars, car exchange, and direct car purchasing.
containerDesc: We sell imported container cars, which are in excellent condition, offering customers quality vehicles at competitive prices.
documentDesc: We offer vehicles that include complete documents, ensuring secure ownership and a smooth registration process.
exchangeDesc: Customers can easily exchange their current vehicle for another car from our collection with a fair price evaluation.
buyDes: We also buy cars directly from customers. Bring your vehicle for evaluation and receive a fair and quick offer.
chooseDesc: We provide trusted and transparent car selling and buying services. Our goal is to make vehicle trading simple, secure, and convenient for every customer.
trusted: Trusted service for selling and buying vehicles.
wide: Wide selection of container and document cars.
fair: Fair pricing and transparent vehicle evaluation.
easyExchange: Easy car exchange and quick car purchasing service.
clientSayDesc: Our customers trust us for buying, selling, and exchanging cars. Here’s what they have to say about our service.
appStoreDesc: Get our app for iOS and enjoy all features seamlessly.
playStoreDesc: Download our Android app and stay connected.
footerDesc: Niazi Khpalwak Car Market provides trusted buying and selling services for container and licensed vehicles across Afghanistan.
team_description: Our experienced team is here to help you find the perfect vehicle and ensure a smooth experience.
contact_description: To make requests for further information, contact us via our social channels.
no_contact_info: No contact information available at the moment.
no_team_members: No team members available at the moment.
vehicle_location_text: This vehicle is available at our verified dealership. Visit our showroom to inspect the vehicle in person or contact our sales team for more information.
car_description: This vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance, comfort, and reliability. Designed to meet the needs of modern drivers, it delivers a smooth driving experience, efficient fuel consumption, and advanced safety features. Whether for daily commuting or long journeys, this car ensures convenience, durability, and style in every drive.
privacy_intro: At Niazai Khpalwak Car Showroom, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
privacy_section1_text: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and any other details you voluntarily provide when contacting us, making an inquiry, or using our services. We also collect non‑personal data like browser type, IP address, and pages visited to improve our website.
privacy_section2_text: We use your information to respond to your inquiries, provide our services, process transactions, improve our website, and communicate with you about our products and offers. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy_section3_text: Our website may use cookies to enhance user experience. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect certain functionalities.
privacy_section5_text: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy_section6_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. If you have any questions, please contact us using the information below.
privacy_section7_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: info@niazaykhpalwak.com or call +93 700 000 000.
